description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.10.0 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a PUBLIC_URL variable set to /bet and a global before_script that runs 'yarn install' then 'yarn build-css' for every job. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that executes 'CI=true yarn build', then removes any existing public folder with 'rm -rf public' and renames the build output to public using 'mv build public'. Configure the pages job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact and to run only on the master branch.
